---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a scanner, report, or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What AI-generated repo failure would this catch?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the finding, expected evidence, and suggested fix.

## Scope check

- Does this keep scanning read-only?
- Does this avoid executing target scripts?
- Does this stay deterministic by default?
- Is this an AI-generated repo reality check rather than a generic lint rule?

## Examples

Share a minimal public example or fixture-style file tree.
